title: Count Prefix And Suffix Pairs Ii
description: Count pairs i<j where words[i] is both a prefix and a suffix of words[j]; duplicates are distinct positions. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: words: list[str]. 1 <= words length <=100000; lowercase words; total characters <=500000; duplicate words are allowed.
output_contract: Return long using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
